prompt: A cinematic surreal scene of a giant red energy drink bottle (Monster-style) lying on a mossy stone ledge, pouring bright red liquid like a waterfall. Below, an athletic man crouches and drinks the liquid from his hands. He is wearing a modern Nike-style gym outfit with glowing neon running shoes. The ground is wet with reflective puddles and ripples from the pouring liquid. Background features dramatic misty mountains and a moody, cloudy sky. A large glowing neon claw-style energy logo appears in the background like a branded advertisement. Ultra-realistic, high detail, shallow depth of field, cinematic lighting, reflections on water, dramatic color contrast (red vs dark tones), professional advertising photography style, 8K resolution.
